goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the 'centre'.
Make sure you get 'entrance fee' and 'attraction type'.
You are also looking for a 'restaurant'. The restaurant should be 'in the same area as the attraction' and should serve 'indian' food.
Make sure you get 'address' and 'phone number'.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the centre
Make sure you get entrance fee and attraction type
You are also looking for a restaurant. The restaurant should be in the same area as the attraction and should serve indian food
Make sure you get address and phone number
